document_info.title: NR; Requirements for support of radio resource management

clauses.title: Introduction
requirements: Requirements for delay within which UE shall activate at least one deactivated SCell and deactivate at least one activated SCell
Applies for EN-DC, standalone NR carrier aggregation, NE-DC, and NR-DC

clauses.title: SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated SCell
requirements: UE configured with at least one downlink SCell in EN-DC, standalone NR CA, NE-DC, or NR-DC
UE shall be capable to transmit valid CSI report and apply actions no later than specified slot

variables.THARQ: Timing between DL data transmission and acknowledgement (ms) as specified in TS 38.213
variables.TCSI_Reporting: Delay including uncertainty in acquiring first available downlink CSI reference resource, UE processing time for CSI reporting and uncertainty in acquiring first available CSI reporting resources

fr1_known_scell.conditions: SCell is known and belongs to FR1
formulas: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{FirstSSB} + T_{\Delta} + 5\ ms$ (if measurement period ≤ 2400 ms)
$T_{activation\_time} = T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + T_{rs} + T_{\Delta} + 5\ ms$ (if measurement period > 2400 ms)

fr1_unknown_scell.conditions: SCell is unknown and belongs to FR1, with side condition Ês/Iot ≥ -2 dB

shortMeasInterval_r18_supported: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{FirstSSB\_MAX,enhanced} + T_{SMTC\_MAX,enhanced} + T_{rs,enhanced} + 5\ ms$ (if contiguous conditions met)
not_supported: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + T_{SMTC\_MAX} + T_{rs} + 5\ ms$ (if contiguous conditions met)

contiguous_conditions: SCell is contiguous to an active serving cell in the same band
ssb-PositionInBurst is same as contiguous FR1 active serving cell
SMTC offset is same as contiguous FR1 active serving cell
RTD with contiguous FR1 active serving cell ≤ 260 ns
Reception power difference with contiguous FR1 active serving cell ≤ 6 dB

shortMeasInterval_r18_supported: $T_{activation\_time} = 6\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX,enhanced} + T_{SMTC\_MAX,enhanced} + T_{rs,enhanced} + T_{L1-RSRP,enhanced\_measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + T_{HARQ} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$ (semi-persistent CSI-RS)

$T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX,enhanced} + T_{SMTC\_MAX,enhanced} + T_{rs,enhanced} + T_{L1-RSRP,enhanced\_measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + max(T_{HARQ} + T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay})$ (periodic CSI-RS)
not_supported: $T_{activation\_time} = 6\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + T_{SMTC\_MAX} + T_{rs} + T_{\Delta} + T_{L1-RSRP,measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + T_{HARQ} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$ (semi-persistent CSI-RS)

$T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + T_{SMTC\_MAX} + T_{rs} + T_{\Delta} + T_{L1-RSRP,measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + max(T_{HARQ} + T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay})$ (periodic CSI-RS)

fr1_ssb_less_scell.scellWithoutSSB_supported: $T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms$ (if RTD ≤ ±260ns, power diff ≤ 6dB, RS QCL-TypeA with TRS, TRS QCL-TypeC with SSB of active serving cell)

conditions: RTD between target SCell and collocated reference serving cell within CP
EPRE difference ≤ 30 dB
RS(s) of SSB-less SCell QCL-TypeA with TRS(s), TRS(s) QCL-TypeC with SSB(s) of inter-band active serving cell
formulas: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{first\_TRS} + T_{TRS} + 5\ ms$ (if EPRE ≤ 12 dB, aperiodic CSI-RS not configured or not supported)
$T_{activation\_time} = T_{first\_ATRS} + T_{gap} + T_{ATRS} + 5\ ms$ (if EPRE ≤ 12 dB, aperiodic CSI-RS configured and supported)

fr2_known_scell.with_smtc: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{FirstSSB} + 5\ ms$ (if SSBs fulfil clause 3.6.3, ssb-PositionsInBurst same, SSB in same half-frame)
fr2_known_scell.without_smtc_scellWithoutSSB: $T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms$ (if RS QCL-TypeD with active serving cell)
fr2_known_scell.highSpeedMeasFlagFR2_r17: $T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms$ (for FR2 power class 6 UE with measEnhCAInterFreqFR2-r18, if RS QCL-TypeD)

fr2_unknown_scell_no_active.known_semi_persistent: $T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$ (Tuncertainty_MAC=0, Tuncertainty_SP=0 if simultaneous reception)
fr2_unknown_scell_no_active.known_periodic: $T_{activation\_time} = max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay} - T_{HARQ})$ (Tuncertainty_MAC=0 if simultaneous reception)
unknown_FR1_FR2_1_semi_persistent: $T_{activation\_time} = 6\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + 15*T_{SMTC\_MAX} + 8*T_{rs} + T_{L1-RSRP,measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + T_{HARQ} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$

$T_{activation\_time} = 6\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX,enhanced} + 15*T_{SMTC\_MAX,enhanced} + X1*T_{rs,enhanced} + T_{L1-RSRP,enhanced\_measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + T_{HARQ} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$ (with reduceForCellDetection/reduceForSSB-L1-RSRP-Meas/shortMeasInterval-r18)
fr2_unknown_scell_no_active.unknown_FR1_FR2_2_semi_persistent: $T_{activation\_time} = 6\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + 23*T_{SMTC\_MAX} + 12*T_{rs} + T_{L1-RSRP,measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + T_{HARQ} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$
unknown_FR1_FR2_1_periodic: $T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + 15*T_{SMTC\_MAX} + 8*T_{rs} + T_{L1-RSRP,measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + max(T_{HARQ} + T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay})$

$T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX,enhanced} + 15*T_{SMTC\_MAX,enhanced} + X1*T_{rs,enhanced} + T_{L1-RSRP,enhanced\_measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + max(T_{HARQ} + T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay})$ (with capabilities)
fr2_unknown_scell_no_active.unknown_FR1_FR2_2_periodic: $T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + 23*T_{SMTC\_MAX} + 12*T_{rs} + T_{L1-RSRP,measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + max(T_{HARQ} + T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay})$

TSMTC_MAX.FR1_intra_band_contiguous: Longer SMTC periodicity between active serving cells and SCell being activated (if cell-specific RS available in same slot)
TSMTC_MAX.FR1_intra_band_non_contiguous: SMTC periodicity of SCell being activated (for UE capable of intraBandNR-CA-non-collocated-r18 without nonCollocatedTypeNR-CA-r18)
TSMTC_MAX.FR2_intra_band: Longer SMTC periodicity between active serving cells and SCell being activated
TSMTC_MAX.FR2_inter_band: SMTC periodicity of SCell being activated

parameter_definitions.Trs: SMTC periodicity of SCell being activated if provided, otherwise from measObjectNR with same SSB frequency and SCS; if no SMTC configured, Trs = 5 ms assuming SSB transmission periodicity is 5 ms
parameter_definitions.Tdelta: Additional time for fine time tracking. T∆ = 2*Trs ms for SCell operating with 12 PRB SSB BW, otherwise T∆ = 0 ms
parameter_definitions.TFirstSSB: Time to end of first complete SSB burst indicated by SMTC, or within 5 ms if SMTC not configured, after slot $n + \frac{T_{HARQ}+3ms}{NR slot length}$
parameter_definitions.TFirstSSB_MAX: Time to end of first complete SSB burst indicated by SMTC, or within 5 ms if SMTC not configured, after slot $n + \frac{T_{HARQ}+3ms}{NR slot length}$, fulfilling occasion when all active serving cells and SCells transmit SSB bursts in same slot (FR1 intra-band) or first occasion when SCell transmits SSB burst (FR1 inter-band) or all transmit in same slot (FR2)
parameter_definitions.TFineTiming: Time period between UE finish processing last activation command for PDCCH TCI, PDSCH TCI and timing of first complete available SSB corresponding to TCI state
parameter_definitions.TL1_RSRP_measure: L1-RSRP measurement delay TL1-RSRP_Measurement_Period_SSB or TL1-RSRP_Measurement_Period_CSI-RS assuming M=1 and TReport=0
parameter_definitions.X1: Reported value in reduceForCellDetection in FR2-1; if absent, X1 = 8

FR1: During period equal to max(5*measCycleSCell, 5*DRX cycles) before reception of SCell activation command:
UE has sent valid measurement report for SCell being activated
SSB measured remains detectable according to cell identification conditions in clause 9.2 and 9.3
SSB measured during the period also remains detectable during SCell activation delay
FR2_first_activation: During period equal to 4s (power class 1/5) or 3s (power class 2/3/4) before receiving last activation command for PDCCH TCI, PDSCH TCI and semi-persistent CSI-RS for CQI reporting:
UE has sent valid L3-RSRP measurement report with SSB index
SCell activation command received after L3-RSRP reporting and no later than MAC-CE command for TCI activation
Reported SSBs with indexes remain detectable from L3-RSRP reporting to valid CQI reporting

TX_values: TX = TFirstSSB if Tactivation_time includes TFirstSSB
TX = TFirstSSB_MAX if Tactivation_time includes TFirstSSB_MAX
TX = Tuncertainty_MAC + TFineTiming if Tactivation_time includes only TFineTiming and no TFirstSSB_MAX
TX = Tfirst_TRS for FR1 inter-band SSB-less SCell activation
TX = Tfirst_ATRS for FR1 inter-band SSB-less SCell activation with aperiodic CSI-RS

notes: Longer delays for RRM measurement requirements can be expected during cell detection time for unknown SCell activation
In case of FR2 also SSB based RLM/BFD/CBD/L1-RSRP measurement requirements can have longer delays
When absoluteFrequencySSB is not configured in DownlinkConfigCommon for target SCell but SMTC is configured, no requirement would be applied
Requirements apply provided that SSB of to-be-activated SCell is within first active DL BWP of the SCell
Starting from slot specified in clause 4.3 of TS 38.213 until SCell activation completion, UE shall report out of range if has available UL resources to report CQI
Starting from slot specified in clause 4.3 of TS 38.213 until first L1-RSRP measurement completed, UE shall report lowest valid L1 SS-RSRP range if has available UL resources

clauses.title: SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated SCell based on measurement in IDLE/INACTIVE mode
requirements: UE configured with at least one downlink SCell in EN-DC, standalone NR CA, NE-DC, or NR-DC
Requirements apply if SCell is unknown and UE supports measValidationReportEMR with measIdleValidityDuration-r18 configured, or
UE supports measValidationReportReselectionMeasurements with measReselectionValidityDuration-r18 configured, or
UE supports idleInactiveNR-MeasReport-r16 without measIdleValidityDuration-r18 or measReselectionValidityDuration-r18 and measIdleDuration-r16 has not expired

fr1_unknown_scell.conditions: SCell belongs to FR1, side condition Ês/Iot ≥ -2dB fulfilled
conditions_to_meet: During 5s before reception of SCell activation command: UE has sent measurement report with SSB index per 4.7.3 or 5.8.3
SSB measured is detectable from earliest measurement to end of SCell activation latency

If measIdleValidityDuration-r18 or measReselectionValidityDuration-r18 configured: earliest measurement is time instance measIdleValidityDuration-r18 or measReselectionValidityDuration-r18 before Msg1 transmission
If only measIdleDuration-r16 configured: earliest measurement is time instance when UE obtained configuration parameter
SSB measured remains detectable per IDLE/INACTIVE mode measurement conditions in 4.2 or CA/DC measurement conditions in 4.4 when UE in IDLE/INACTIVE state
SSB measured remains detectable per cell identification conditions in clause 9.2 and 9.3 when UE in CONNECTED mode

fr2_unknown_scell.conditions: SCell belongs to FR2, side condition Ês/Iot ≥ -2dB fulfilled
conditions_to_meet: During 4s (power class 1/5) or 3s (power class 2/3/4) before receiving last activation command for PDCCH TCI, PDSCH TCI and semi-persistent CSI-RS for CQI reporting:
UE has sent measurement report with SSB index per 4.7.3 or 5.8.3
SSB measured is detectable from earliest measurement to end of SCell activation latency

If measIdleValidityDuration-r18 or measReselectionValidityDuration-r18 configured: earliest measurement is time instance measIdleValidityDuration-r18 or measReselectionValidityDuration-r18 before Msg1 transmission
If only measIdleDuration-r16 configured: earliest measurement is time instance when UE obtained configuration parameter
SSB measured remains detectable per IDLE/INACTIVE mode measurement conditions in 4.2 or CA/DC measurement conditions in 4.4 when UE in IDLE/INACTIVE state
SSB measured remains detectable per cell identification conditions in clause 9.2 and 9.3 when UE in CONNECTED mode
formulas: FR1-FR2-1 CA with semi-persistent CSI-RS: $T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + 15*T_{SMTC\_MAX} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$ (Tuncertainty_MAC=0, Tuncertainty_SP=0 if simultaneous reception)

FR1-FR2-1 CA with periodic CSI-RS: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{FirstSSB\_MAX} + 15*T_{SMTC\_MAX} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay} - T_{HARQ})$ (Tuncertainty_MAC=0 if simultaneous reception)

parameter_definitions.Tuncertainty_MAC: Time period between reception of last activation command for PDCCH TCI, PDSCH TCI relative to SCell activation command, TCI state selected based on latest reported SSB indexes
parameter_definitions.Tuncertainty_RRC: Time period between reception of RRC configuration message for TCI of periodic CSI-RS for CQI reporting relative to SCell activation command, TCI state selected based on latest reported SSB indexes
parameter_definitions.Tuncertainty_SP: Time period between reception of activation command for semi-persistent CSI-RS resource set for CQI reporting relative to SCell activation command, TCI state for semi-persistent CSI-RS selected based on latest reported SSB indexes

clauses.title: SCell Deactivation Delay Requirement for Activated SCell
requirements: UE configured with at least one downlink SCell in EN-DC, standalone NR CA, NE-DC, or NR-DC
Upon receiving SCell deactivation command in slot n, UE shall accomplish deactivation actions no later than in slot $n + \frac{T_{HARQ}+3ms}{NR\ slot\ length}$

interruption_window.ending_point: Not after slot $n+1+\frac{T_{HARQ}+3ms}{NR\ slot\ length}$ (for MAC command)
interruption_window.ending_point_timer: Not after slot $n+1+\frac{3ms}{NR\ slot\ length}$ (for timer expiry)

notes: Length of interruption window may be different for different victim cells
Depends on applicable scenario and frequency band relation between aggressor cell and victim cell

clauses.title: Direct SCell Activation at SCell addition
requirements: Applies for UE configured in RRC reconfiguration message with one SCell where sCellState is set to activated
If RRC reconfiguration also configures PSCell addition or PSCell change, direct SCell activation delay may be longer

Ndirect: $N_{direct} = T_{RRC\_Process} + T_1 + T_{activation\_time} + T_{CSI\_Reporting} - 3\ ms$ (if TCI state not indicated within Tactivation_time)

variables.slot_n: Last slot overlapping with PDSCH containing RRC reconfiguration message
variables.TRRC_Process: RRC procedure delay as specified in TS 36.331 clause 11.2 (if embedded in E-UTRA RRC message) or TS 38.331 clause 12 (otherwise)
variables.T1: Delay from slot $n+\frac{T_{RRC\_Process}}{NR\ slot\ length}$ until transmission of RRCReconfigurationComplete message (UE implementation dependent)

TFirstSSB_override.TFirstSSB: Time to end of first complete SSB burst indicated by SMTC after slot $n + \frac{T_{RRC\_Process}+T_1}{NR\ slot\ length}$
TFirstSSB_override.TFirstSSB_MAX: Time to end of first complete SSB burst indicated by SMTC after slot $n + \frac{T_{RRC\_Process}+T_1}{NR\ slot\ length}$, fulfilling:
TFirstSSB_override.FR1_intra_band: Occasion when all active serving cells and SCells transmit SSB bursts in same slot
TFirstSSB_override.FR1_inter_band: First occasion when SCell being activated transmits SSB burst
TFirstSSB_override.FR2: Occasion when all active serving cells and SCells transmit SSB bursts in same slot

FR1: During last 5 seconds before reception of direct SCell configuration command:
UE has sent valid measurement report for SCell being directly activated
SSB measured remains detectable per cell identification conditions in clauses 9.2 and 9.3
SSB measured during 5 seconds also remains detectable during SCell activation delay
known_scell_conditions.FR2: Same conditions as defined in clause 8.3.2

TX_values: TX = TFirstSSB if Tactivation_time includes TFirstSSB
TX = TFirstSSB_MAX if Tactivation_time includes TFirstSSB_MAX
TX = Tuncertainty_MAC + TFineTiming if Tactivation_time includes TFineTiming

notes: Starting from slot $n+\frac{T_{RRC\_Process}+T_1}{NR\ slot\ length}$ until direct SCell activation completion, UE shall report CQI index = 0 (out of range) if has available UL resources

clauses.title: Direct SCell Activation at Handover
requirements: Applies for UE configured in RRC reconfiguration message for handover with one SCell where sCellState is set to activated

Ndirect: $N_{direct} = T_{RRC\_process} + T_{interrupt} + T_2 + T_3 + T_{activation\_time} + T_{CSI\_Reporting} - 3\ ms$ (if TCI state not indicated within Tactivation_time)
$N_{direct} = T_{RRC\_process} + T_{interrupt} + T_2 + T_3 + T_{HARQ} + T_{activation\_time} + T_{CSI\_Reporting}$ (otherwise)

variables.slot_n: Last slot overlapping with PDSCH containing RRC reconfiguration message
variables.TRRC_Process: RRC procedure delay per TS 36.331 clause 11.2 (E-UTRA) or TS 38.331 clause 12 (NR)
variables.Tinterrupt: Interruption time during handover per clause 6.1.1
variables.T2: Delay from slot $n+\frac{T_{RRC\_Process}+T_{interrupt}}{NR\ slot\ length}$ until UE has obtained valid TA command for target PCell
variables.T3: Delay for applying received TA for UL transmission in target PCell, ≥ k+1 slot where k defined in TS 38.213 clause 4.2

TFirstSSB_override.TFirstSSB: Time to end of first complete SSB burst indicated by SMTC after slot $n + \frac{T_{RRC\_Process}+T_{interrupt}+T_2+T_3}{NR\ slot\ length}$
TFirstSSB_override.TFirstSSB_MAX: Time to end of first complete SSB burst indicated by SMTC after slot $n + \frac{T_{RRC\_Process}+T_{interrupt}+T_2+T_3}{NR\ slot\ length}$, fulfilling:
TFirstSSB_override.FR1_intra_band: Occasion when all active serving cells and SCells transmit SSB bursts in same slot
TFirstSSB_override.FR1_inter_band: First occasion when SCell being activated transmits SSB burst
TFirstSSB_override.FR2: Occasion when all active serving cells and SCells transmit SSB bursts in same slot

FR1: During last 5 seconds before reception of direct SCell configuration command:
UE has sent valid measurement report for SCell being directly activated
SSB measured remains detectable per cell identification conditions in clauses 9.2 and 9.3
SSB measured during 5 seconds also remains detectable during SCell activation delay
known_scell_conditions.FR2: Same conditions as defined in clause 8.3.2

TX_values: TX = TFirstSSB if Tactivation_time includes TFirstSSB
TX = TFirstSSB_MAX if Tactivation_time includes TFirstSSB_MAX
TX = Tuncertainty_MAC + TFineTiming if Tactivation_time includes TFineTiming

notes: Starting from slot $n+\frac{T_{RRC\_Process}+T_{interrupt}+T_2+T_3}{NR\ slot\ length}$ until direct SCell activation completion, UE shall report CQI index = 0 (out of range) if has available UL resources

clauses.title: Direct SCell Activation at RRC Resume
requirements: Applies for UE configured in RRC reconfiguration message for RRC Resume with one SCell where sCellState is set to activated

timing_formulas.note: Requirements in clause 8.3.4 apply, except T1 definition replaced with:
timing_formulas.T1: Delay from slot $n+\frac{T_{RRC\_Process}}{NR\ slot\ length}$ until transmission of RRCResumeComplete message

clauses.title: SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated SCell with Multiple Downlink SCells
requirements: UE configured with more than one downlink SCells
In EN-DC, NE-DC, standalone NR CA, or one CG of NR-DC: UE receives one MAC command for multiple SCell activation, no other SCell activation/deactivation/addition/release before completion
In two CGs of NR-DC: UE receives one MAC command per CG, supports per-FR measurement gap, any unknown SCell has active serving cell(s) or known to-be-activated SCell(s) on same band

variables.Tactivation_time_multiple_scells: Target SCell activation delay in milliseconds in multiple SCell activation scenario

measurement_period_leq_2400ms: $T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = T_{FirstSSB\_MAX\_multiple\_scells} + T_{rs} + 5\ ms$ (if parallel known SCell with measurement period > 2400ms but no parallel unknown SCell)
$T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = T_{FirstSSB\_MAX\_multiple\_scells} + T_{SMTC\_MAX\_multiple\_scells} + T_{rs} + 5\ ms$ (if parallel unknown SCell)
measurement_period_gt_2400ms: $T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = T_{FirstSSB\_MAX\_multiple\_scells} + T_{SMTC\_MAX\_multiple\_scells} + T_{rs} + 5\ ms$ (if parallel unknown SCell)

otherwise: $T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = 6\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX\_multiple\_scells} + T_{SMTC\_MAX\_multiple\_scells} + T_{rs}*N1 + T_{L1-RSRP,measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + T_{HARQ} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC\_multiple\_scells} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP\_multiple\_scells})$ (semi-persistent CSI-RS)

$T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = 3\ ms + T_{FirstSSB\_MAX\_multiple\_scells} + T_{SMTC\_MAX\_multiple\_scells} + T_{rs}*N1 + T_{L1-RSRP,measure} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + max(T_{HARQ} + T_{uncertainty\_MAC\_multiple\_scells} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC\_multiple\_scells} + T_{RRC\_delay})$ (periodic CSI-RS)

N1_definition.description: Number counting for parallel FR1 unknown to-be-activated SCell(s) except those fulfilling:
exclusion_conditions: Contiguous to active serving cell in same band, or to known SCell in same band being activated by same MAC PDU
Single SSB used in unknown SCell; or multiple SSBs used and TCI state indication for PDCCH provided by same MAC PDU
ssb-PositionInBurst same as contiguous FR1 known cell or active serving cell
RTD with contiguous FR1 known cell or active serving cell ≤ 260 ns
Reception power difference with contiguous FR1 known cell or active serving cell ≤ 6 dB
SMTC offset same as contiguous FR1 known cell or active serving cell

fr2_scell.with_active_serving_cell: Same as single SCell activation delay in clause 8.3.2
fr2_scell.known_semi_persistent: Same as single SCell activation delay in clause 8.3.2
fr2_scell.known_periodic: Same as single SCell activation delay in clause 8.3.2
fr2_scell.unknown_semi_persistent_with_known_paral: $T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = 3\ ms + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC\_multiple\_scells} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP\_multiple\_scells})$ (Tuncertainty_MAC=0, Tuncertainty_SP=0 if simultaneous reception)
fr2_scell.unknown_periodic_with_known_parallel: $T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC\_multiple\_scells} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC\_multiple\_scells} + T_{RRC\_delay} - T_{HARQ})$ (Tuncertainty_MAC=0 if simultaneous reception)

TSMTC_MAX_multiple_scells.FR1_intra_band: Longest SMTC periodicity between active serving cells and SCells being activated on same band (if cell-specific RS available in same slot)
TSMTC_MAX_multiple_scells.FR1_inter_band: Longest SMTC periodicity of SCells being activated on same band
TSMTC_MAX_multiple_scells.FR2: Longest SMTC periodicity between active serving cells and SCell(s) being activated in FR2 intra-band CA

parameter_definitions.TFirstSSB_MAX_multiple_scells: Time to end of first complete SSB burst indicated by SMTC after slot $n + \frac{T_{HARQ}+3ms}{NR\ slot\ length}$, fulfilling occasion when all active serving cells and SCells transmit SSB bursts in same slot (intra-band) or first occasion when SCells transmit SSB burst (inter-band)

additional_interruptions.conditions: If start of first complete SSB used in TX in different bands not aligned after $n+\frac{T_{HARQ}+3ms}{NR\ slot\ length}$
limitations: Number of additional interruptions ≤ number of FR1 bands with both SCell being activated (requirements involve TFirstSSB_MAX_multiple_scells with Trs) and active serving cell
Each interruption length defined in clause 8.2.2.2.2

clauses.title: SCell Deactivation Delay Requirement for Activated SCell with Multiple Downlink SCells
requirements: UE configured with multiple downlink SCells in EN-DC, standalone NR CA, NE-DC, or NR-DC
No other SCell activation/deactivation/addition/release before deactivation completed for all SCells deactivated by single MAC CE
In EN-DC and NE-DC: no E-UTRAN SCell activation/deactivation/addition/release before multiple SCell deactivation completed
UE receives one single MAC command for multiple SCell deactivation (or one MAC command per CG for per-FR measurement gap capable UE in NR-DC)

timing_formulas.deactivation_delay: Same delay as specified in clause 8.3.3

clauses.interruption_window: Same as single SCell activation requirement in clause 8.3.3

clauses.title: Direct SCell Activation of Multiple Downlink SCells at SCell addition
requirements: UE configured in RRC reconfiguration message with 2 SCells where sCellState is set to activated
In EN-DC, NE-DC, standalone NR, or one CG of NR-DC: UE receives one RRC reconfiguration message, no other SCell activation/deactivation/addition/release before completion
In two CGs of NR-DC: UE receives one RRC message per CG, supports per-FR measurement gap, any unknown SCell has active serving cell(s) or known to-be-activated SCell(s) on same band

Ndirect_multiple_scells: $N_{direct\_multiple\_scells} = T_{RRC\_Process} + T_1 + T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} + T_{CSI\_Reporting} - 3\ ms$ (if TCI state not indicated within Tactivation_time)

clauses.TFirstSSB_MAX_multiple_scells_override: Time to end of first complete SSB burst indicated by SMTC after slot $n + \frac{T_{RRC\_Process}+T_1}{NR\ slot\ length}$, fulfilling conditions per FR1 intra-band/inter-band and FR2

TX_values: TX = TFirstSSB if Tactivation_time_multiple_scells includes TFirstSSB
TX = TFirstSSB_MAX if Tactivation_time_multiple_scells includes TFirstSSB_MAX
TX = TFirstSSB_MAX_multiple_scells if Tactivation_time_multiple_scells includes TFirstSSB_MAX_multiple_scells
TX = Tuncertainty_MAC + TFineTiming if Tactivation_time_multiple_scells includes TFineTiming

clauses.title: Direct SCell Activation of Multiple Downlink SCells at Handover
requirements: UE configured in RRC reconfiguration message for handover with 2 SCells where sCellState is set to activated
In MCG of NE-DC, MCG of NR-DC, or standalone NR: no other RRC reconfiguration for direct activation, no other SCell activation/deactivation/addition/release before completion

Ndirect_multiple_scells: $N_{direct\_multiple\_scells} = T_{RRC\_process} + T_{interrupt} + T_2 + T_3 + T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} + T_{CSI\_Reporting} - 3\ ms$ (if TCI state not indicated within Tactivation_time)
$N_{direct\_multiple\_scells} = T_{RRC\_process} + T_{interrupt} + T_2 + T_3 + T_{HARQ} + T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} + T_{CSI\_Reporting}$ (otherwise)

clauses.TFirstSSB_MAX_multiple_scells_override: Time to end of first complete SSB burst indicated by SMTC after slot $n + \frac{T_{RRC\_Process}+T_{interrupt}+T_2+T_3}{NR\ slot\ length}$

clauses.title: Direct SCell Activation of Multiple Downlink SCells at RRC Resume
requirements: UE configured in RRC reconfiguration message for RRC Resume with 2 SCells where sCellState is set to activated

timing_formulas.note: Requirements in clause 8.3.9 apply, except T1 definition replaced with corresponding definition in clause 8.3.6

clauses.title: SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated PUCCH SCell
requirements: UE configured with one downlink SCell and PUCCH configured for SCell being activated

valid_ta_available.TA_validity: TA is valid if TimeAlignmentTimer associated with TAG containing PUCCH SCell is running

variables.Ttarget_PL_RS: Periodicity of target pathloss reference signal determined during PUCCH SCell activation
variables.TFirst_available_CSI: Delay uncertainty in acquiring first available downlink CSI reference resource
variables.TCSI_processing: UE processing time for CSI reporting
variables.TCSI_reporting_after: Delay uncertainty in acquiring first available CSI reporting resources after end of max((TFirst_available_CSI + TCSI_processing), 3*Ttarget_PL-RS)

no_valid_ta.T1_definition: Delay uncertainty in acquiring first available PDCCH triggered PRACH occasion in PUCCH SCell after slot $n+\frac{T_{HARQ}+T_{activation\_time}}{NR\ slot\ length}$; up to summation of delay uncertainty for PDCCH order reception, SSB to PRACH occasion association period and 10 ms
no_valid_ta.T2_definition: Delay from slot $n+\frac{T_{HARQ}+T_{activation\_time}+T_1}{NR\ slot\ length}$ until UE has obtained valid TA command for target PUCCH SCell
no_valid_ta.T3_definition: Delay for applying received TA for UL transmission on target PUCCH SCell per TS 38.213 clause 4.2

known_PUCCH_SCell: PUCCH SCell activation command received within 1280 ms upon last transmission of RS resource used for L3 measurement reporting
Target PL-RS determination based on latest L3 measurement reporting
Target PL-RS remains detectable during PUCCH SCell activation period
Associated SSBs with target PL-RS remain detectable during PUCCH SCell activation period

notes: Requirements apply provided: target PL-RS is known (otherwise longer activation time expected)
RA on PUCCH SCell not interrupted by RA on PCell (otherwise additional delay expected)
No SRS carrier based switching or SRS antenna port switching during SCell activation (otherwise delay can be extended)

clauses.title: SCell activation delay Requirement for Deactivated PUCCH SCell with Multiple SCells
requirements: UE configured with multiple deactivated downlink SCells and PUCCH configured for a SCell
PUCCH SCell with downlink SCell(s) activated by one MAC command
For EN-DC, NE-DC, standalone NR: UE receives single MAC command, no other SCell activation/deactivation/addition/release before completion
All DL SCells being activated in secondary PUCCH group are unknown if PUCCH SCell being activated is unknown
If to-be-activated FR2 PUCCH SCell is unknown, no to-be-activated FR1 SCell counted in N1

clauses.title: SCell Deactivation Delay Requirement for Activated PUCCH SCell
requirements: UE configured with one SCell configured with PUCCH in EN-DC, standalone NR CA, or NE-DC

clauses.title: SCell Deactivation Delay Requirement for Activated PUCCH SCell with Multiple Downlink SCells
requirements: UE configured with multiple downlink SCells and one SCell configured with PUCCH in EN-DC, standalone NR CA, or NE-DC
No other SCell activation/deactivation/addition/release before deactivation completed
UE receives one single MAC command for multiple SCell deactivation

timing_formulas.deactivation: Same delay as specified in clause 8.3.14

clauses.title: Fast SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated SCell
requirements: Aperiodic CSI-RS resources configured for fast SCell activation
UE configured with one downlink SCell in EN-DC, standalone NR CA, NE-DC, or NR-DC
UE provided with aperiodic CSI-RS resources for SCell activation for target SCell
notes: If UE is allocated A-TRS for fast Scell activation, UE is not required to use SSB of target Scell
Transmitted SSB defined in clause 8.3.x1 also applied if UE supports On-demand SSB operation and OD-SSB transmission is indicated
fr1_known_scell: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{FirstATRS} + T_{gap} + T_{ATRS} + 5\ ms$ (if measurement period > 2400 ms)
clauses.fr1_unknown_scell_contiguous: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{FirstATRS} + T_{gap} + T_{ATRS} + 5\ ms$ (if contiguous conditions met)
clauses.fr2_with_active_serving_cell: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{FirstATRS} + 5\ ms$ (if aperiodic CSI-RS resources provided, SSBs fulfil clause 3.6.3, ssb-PositionsInBurst same, SSB in same half-frame)

parameter_definitions.TFirstATRS: Time to end of first complete CSI-RS burst for SCell activation after slot $n + \frac{T_{HARQ}+3ms}{NR\ slot\ length}$ (CSI-RS burst = four CSI-RS resources in two consecutive slots)
parameter_definitions.TATRS: CSI-RS burst for SCell activation (four CSI-RS resources in two consecutive slots)
parameter_definitions.Tgap: Gap length between two aperiodic CSI-RS bursts: ≥ 2 slots for 15/30 kHz, ≥ 3 slots for 60 kHz

clauses.title: SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated SCell with the L3 reporting during activation
requirements: UE supporting l3-MeasUnknownSCellActivation-r18 configured with ReportOnScellActivation
UE reporting valid L3 measurement results after receiving SCell activation command for unknown SCell
Clause 8.3.2 applied for UE who does not report L3 measurement results

timing_formulas.semi_persistent: $T_{activation\_time} = 10\ ms + T_{L3,report} + T_{HARQ} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$
timing_formulas.periodic: $T_{activation\_time} = 7\ ms + T_{L3,report} + max(T_{HARQ} + T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay})$

conditions_for_reduced_formula: SCell belongs to FR1 with no active serving cell contiguous and side condition Ês/Iot ≥ -2 dB fulfilled
Target SCell belongs to FR1 and neither single SSB indicated nor multiple SSBs with TCI indication in same MAC PDU
SCell belongs to FR2-1 with no active serving cell and PCell/PSCell in FR1 or FR2-1
PCell/PSCell and target SCell configured as FR1-FR2-1 CA or in FR2-1 band pair with independent beam management, target SCell unknown with side condition Ês/Iot ≥ -2 dB fulfilled

TL3_report_definition.description: Delay of acquiring first available UL resource for L3 reporting from 7 ms + THARQ after receiving SCell activation command
TL3_report_definition.UE_ready_time: UE ready to report L3 measurement result no later than 7 ms + THARQ from receiving SCell activation command
TL3_report_definition.UE_not_required_after: UE not required to report L3 results after 3 ms + THARQ + M ms

clauses.title: SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated SCell with Multiple Downlink SCells with L3 reporting
requirements: UE configured with more than one SCells supporting l3-MeasUnknownSCellActivation-r18
UE configured with ReportOnScellActivation
In EN-DC, NE-DC, standalone NR, or one CG of NR-DC: UE receives one MAC command, no other SCell activation/deactivation/addition/release before completion
All to-be-activated SCells unknown on same FR2 band with no active serving cell(s) or known SCell(s), OR
All to-be-activated SCells unknown on same FR1 band with no active serving cell contiguous or known SCell(s) contiguous
UE reports valid L3 measurement results after receiving SCell activation command

timing_formulas.semi_persistent: $T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = 10\ ms + T_{HARQ} + T_{L3,report} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$
timing_formulas.periodic: $T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = 7\ ms + T_{L3,report} + max(T_{HARQ} + T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay})$

conditions_for_reduced_formula: SCell belongs to FR1 with side condition Ês/Iot ≥ -2 dB fulfilled
Target SCell belongs to FR1 and neither single SSB indicated nor multiple SSBs with TCI indication in same MAC PDU
SCell belongs to FR2 and PCell or PSCell in FR1 with side condition Ês/Iot ≥ -2 dB fulfilled

clauses.title: OD-SSB based SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated SCell
requirements: UE supporting On-demand SSB operation configured with at least one downlink OD-SSB SCell in EN-DC, standalone NR CA, NE-DC, or NR-DC
Applies when OD-SSB transmission activated in configured DL BWP where first SSB transmission not configured, OR
OD-SSB transmission activated in configured DL BWP where first SSB transmission configured but cannot be used to obtain SIB1
fr1_known_scell: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{First,OD-SSB} + T_{\Delta} + 5\ ms$ (if measurement period ≤ 2400 ms)
$T_{activation\_time} = T_{First,OD-SSB} + T_{rs,OD-SSB} + T_{\Delta} + 5\ ms$ (if measurement period > 2400 ms)

otherwise: $T_{activation\_time} = 6\ ms + T_{First,OD-SSB} + 2*T_{rs,OD-SSB} + T_{L1-RSRP,measure,OD-SSB} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + T_{HARQ} + max(T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + T_{FineTiming,OD-SSB} + 2\ ms, T_{uncertainty\_SP})$ (semi-persistent CSI-RS)

$T_{activation\_time} = 3\ ms + T_{First,OD-SSB} + 2*T_{rs,OD-SSB} + T_{L1-RSRP,measure,OD-SSB} + T_{L1-RSRP,report} + max(T_{HARQ} + T_{uncertainty\_MAC} + 5\ ms + T_{FineTiming,OD-SSB}, T_{uncertainty\_RRC} + T_{RRC\_delay})$ (periodic CSI-RS)

clauses.fr2_with_active_serving_cell: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{First,OD-SSB} + 5\ ms$ (if SSBs fulfil clause 3.6.3, ssb-PositionsInBurst same, SSB in same half-frame)

parameter_definitions.Tdelta_OD_SSB: Additional time for fine timing tracking. T∆ = 2*Trs,OD-SSB ms for SCell operating with 12 PRB SSB BW, otherwise T∆ = 0 ms
parameter_definitions.TFirst_OD_SSB: Time to end of first complete transmitted SSB burst after slot $n + \frac{T_{HARQ}+3ms}{NR\ slot\ length}$
parameter_definitions.TFineTiming_OD_SSB: Time period between UE finish processing last activation command for PDCCH TCI, PDSCH TCI and timing of first complete transmitted SSB burst corresponding to TCI state
parameter_definitions.TL1_RSRP_measure_OD_SSB: Transmitted SSB based L1-RSRP measurement delay TL1-RSRP_Measurement_Period_SSB assuming M=1 and TReport=0

clauses.title: OD-SSB based SCell Deactivation Delay Requirement for Activated SCell
requirements: UE supporting On-demand SSB operation configured with at least one downlink SCell where OD-SSB transmission is activated

clauses.title: OD-SSB based Direct SCell Activation at SCell addition
requirements: UE supporting On-demand SSB operation configured in RRC reconfiguration message with one SCell where sCellState is set to activated and OD-SSB configuration provided

Ndirect: $N_{direct} = T_{RRC\_Process} + T_1 + T_{activation\_time} + T_{CSI\_Reporting} - 3\ ms$ (if TCI state not indicated within Tactivation_time)

fr1_known_scell: $T_{activation\_time} = T_{First,OD-SSB} + T_{rs,OD-SSB} + 5\ ms$ (if measurement period > 2400 ms)

clauses.title: OD-SSB based SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated SCell with Multiple Downlink SCells
requirements: UE configured with more than one downlink OD-SSB based SCells
fr1_known_scell_leq_2400ms: $T_{activation\_time\_multiple\_scells} = T_{First,OD-SSB\_multiple\_scells} + T_{rs,OD-SSB} + 5\ ms$ (if parallel known SCell with measurement period > 2400ms but no parallel unknown SCell)

clauses.title: OD-SSB based SCell Deactivation Delay Requirement for Activated SCell with Multiple Downlink SCells
requirements: UE supporting On-demand SSB operation configured with multiple downlink SCells where OD-SSB transmission is activated

timing_formulas.deactivation: Same delay as specified in clause 8.3.20

clauses.title: SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated PUCCH SCell based on OD-SSB
requirements: UE configured with one downlink SCell and PUCCH configured for SCell being activated
If UE receives SSB activation command together with on-demand SSB activation command
notes: UE shall be capable to transmit valid CSI report and apply actions as required by clause 8.3.12, except Tactivation_time
Tactivation_time defined in clause 8.3.19

clauses.title: OD-SSB based SCell Deactivation Delay Requirement for Activated PUCCH SCell
requirements: UE supporting On-demand SSB operation configured with one SCell configured with PUCCH where OD-SSB transmission is activated

clauses.title: OD-SSB based SCell Activation Delay Requirement for Deactivated SCell with the L3 reporting during activation
requirements: UE supporting l3-MeasUnknownSCellActivation-r18 and On-demand SSB operation
Reporting valid L3 measurement results after receiving SCell activation command for unknown SCell configured with OD-SSB operation
notes: Requirements in clause 8.3.17 apply, except:
TFineTiming is time period between UE finish processing last activation command and timing of first complete available SSB burst corresponding to TCI state
TSSB is same as Trs,OD-SSB as specified in clause 8.3.19
TSMTC is same as Trs,OD-SSB as specified in clause 8.3.19
ssb-PositionInBurst replaced with od-ssb-PositionsInBurst if provided

clauses.title: Active TCI state switching delay

sub_clauses.title: Introduction
requirements: Requirements apply for UE configured with one or more TCI state configurations on serving cell in MR-DC or standalone NR
UE shall complete switch of active TCI state within delay defined in this clause

sub_clauses.title: Known conditions for TCI state
conditions: During period from last transmission of RS resource used for L1-RSRP measurement reporting for target TCI state to completion of active TCI state switch
TCI state switch command received within 1280 ms upon last transmission of RS resource for beam reporting or measurement
UE has sent at least 1 L1-RSRP report for target TCI state before TCI state switch command
TCI state remains detectable during TCI state switching period
SSB associated with TCI state remains detectable during TCI switching period
SNR of TCI state ≥ -3 dB

sub_clauses.title: MAC-CE based TCI state switch delay

known_tci_state.formula: UE able to receive PDCCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + T_{Ok}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc})$ / NR slot length
known_tci_state.old_tci_valid_until: UE able to receive PDCCH with old TCI state until slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu}$

variables.Tfirst_SSB: Time to first SSB transmission after MAC CE command decoded by UE (or time to first available SSB reception based on LBCA-SwitchingPattern if UE supports LB-CA via switching)
variables.TOk: 1 if target TCI state not in active TCI state list for PDSCH, 0 otherwise

unknown_tci_state.formula: UE able to receive PDCCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + T_{L1-RSRP} + T_{Ouk}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc})$ / NR slot length
unknown_tci_state.old_tci_valid_until: UE able to receive PDCCH with old TCI state until slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu}$
unknown_tci_state.TL1_RSRP: 0 in FR1 or when TCI state switching not involving QCL-TypeD in FR2; otherwise time for Rx beam refinement in FR2
unknown_tci_state.TOuk: 1 for CSI-RS based L1-RSRP measurement, 0 for SSB based L1-RSRP measurement when TCI state switching involves QCL-TypeD; 1 when TCI state switching involves other QCL types only

sub_clauses.title: MAC-CE based TCI state switch delay in HST FR2 scenarios
requirements: For FR2 power class 6 UE

known_tci_state.formula: UE able to receive PDCCH with target TCI state at symbol m of first slot after slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + T_{Ok}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc} + T_{rs} + T_{rs-proc})$ / NR slot length

variables.Trs: Time to first TRS or SSB transmission after SSB transmission in Tfirst-SSB definition is processed by UE
variables.TOk: 1, m = 0 if target TCI state not in active TCI state list for PDSCH; otherwise TOk = 0, m = 1

sub_clauses.title: DCI based TCI state switch delay
requirements: If target TCI state is known and UE configured with tci-PresentInDCI set to 'enabled' for CORESET scheduling PDSCH at slot n
sub_clauses.formula: UE able to receive PDSCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot n + timeDurationForQCL
sub_clauses.timeDurationForQCL: Time required by UE to perform PDCCH reception and applying spatial QCL information received in DCI for PDSCH processing

sub_clauses.title: RRC based TCI state switch delay

known_tci_state.formula: UE able to receive PDCCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + (T_{RRC\_processing} + T_{Ok}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc}))$ / NR slot length

unknown_tci_state.formula: UE able to receive PDCCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + (T_{RRC\_processing} + T_{L1-RSRP} + T_{Ouk}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc}))$ / NR slot length

sub_clauses.note: UE not required to receive PDCCH/PDSCH/CSI-RS or transmit PUCCH/PUSCH until end of switching period

sub_clauses.title: Active TCI state list update delay

known_tci_state.formula: UE able to receive PDCCH to schedule PDSCH with new target TCI state at first slot after $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + T_{Ok}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc})$ / NR slot length

clauses.title: Active downlink TCI state switching delay for unified TCI

sub_clauses.title: Introduction
requirements: Requirements apply for UE configured with dl-OrJointTCI-StateList configurations for DL channels on serving cell
Requirements also apply for serving cells in simultaneousU-TCI-UpdateList1/2/3/4 in MR-DC or standalone NR if all serving cells configured with same serving cell and BWP in unifiedTCI-StateRef-r17
additional_pci_conditions: Active BWP of serving cell and cell with additional PCI are same
Center frequency, SCS and SFN offset of cell with additional PCI same as serving cell
Cell with additional PCI is known to UE

sub_clauses.title: Known conditions for downlink TCI state
conditions: During period from last transmission of RS resource used for L1-RSRP measurement reporting for target DL TCI state to completion of active DL TCI state switch
DL TCI state switch command received within 1280 ms upon last transmission of RS resource for beam reporting or measurement
UE has sent at least 1 L1-RSRP report for target DL TCI state before DL TCI state switch command
Target DL TCI state remains detectable during DL TCI state switching period
SSB associated with DL TCI state remains detectable during DL TCI switching period
SNR of DL TCI state ≥ -3 dB
SSB can be associated with either serving cell PCI or PCI different from serving cell PCI

sub_clauses.title: MAC-CE based downlink TCI state switch delay

known_tci_state.formula: UE able to receive UE-dedicated PDCCH/PDSCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + T_{Ok}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc})$ / NR slot length
known_tci_state.old_tci_valid_until: UE able to receive UE-dedicated PDCCH/PDSCH with old TCI state until slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu}$

unknown_tci_state.formula: UE able to receive UE-dedicated PDCCH/PDSCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + (T_{L1-RSRP} + T_{Ouk}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc}))$ / NR slot length

sub_clauses.title: DCI based downlink TCI state switch delay
requirements: UE configured with dl-OrJointTCI-StateList or TCI-UL-State, activated with TCI states for downlink transmission by MAC CE indication of more than one codepoints
sub_clauses.formula: DL TCI switching to indicated DL TCI state or joint TCI state in DCI format completed starting from first slot at least beamAppTime-r17 symbols after last symbol of PUCCH carrying HARQ-ACK in response to DCI triggering TCI state activation

sub_clauses.title: Active Downlink TCI state list update delay
sub_clauses.all_known: UE completed TCI state list update in slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + T_{Ok}*(T_{first-SSB\_List} + T_{SSB-proc})$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.subset_unknown: UE completed TCI state list update in slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + (T_{L1-RSRP\_list} + T_{Ouk}*(T_{first-SSB\_List} + T_{SSB-proc}))$ / NR slot length

clauses.title: Active uplink TCI state switching delay for unified TCI

sub_clauses.title: Introduction
requirements: Requirements apply for UE configured with dl-OrJointTCI-StateList (if unifiedTCI-StateType is Joint) or TCI-UL-State configurations for UL channels/signals on serving cell
No requirement when UE requested to switch to TCI state with TCI-UL-State associated to SRS

sub_clauses.title: Known conditions for uplink TCI state
conditions: During period from last transmission of RS resource used for L1-RSRP measurement reporting for target UL TCI state to completion of active UL TCI state switch
UL TCI state switch command received within 1280 ms upon last transmission of RS resource for beam reporting or measurement
UE has sent at least 1 L1-RSRP report for target UL TCI state before UL TCI state switch command
RS configured in target UL TCI state remains detectable during UL TCI state switching period
SNR of RS configured in target UL TCI state ≥ -3 dB
Target UL TCI state remains detectable during UL TCI state switching period
SSB associated with UL TCI state remains detectable during UL TCI switching period
SNR of UL TCI state ≥ -3 dB

sub_clauses.title: MAC-CE based uplink TCI state switch delay
requirements: For separate UL TCI state switch or joint TCI state switch for PUCCH/PUSCH/SRS when beamCorrespondenceWithoutUL-BeamSweeping is set to 1
sub_clauses.known_tci_state: UE able to transmit UL signal with target TCI state in slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + N_M*(T_{first\_target-PL-RS} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS} + 2\ ms)$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.unknown_tci_state: UE able to transmit UL signal with target TCI state in slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + (T_{L1-RSRP} + T_{first\_target-PL-RS} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS} + 2\ ms)$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.NM: 1 if target PL-RS not maintained by UE, 0 otherwise

clauses.title: Active downlink TCI state switching delay for unified TCI for single-DCI mTRP

sub_clauses.title: Introduction
requirements: Requirements apply for UE configured with dl-OrJointTCI-StateList configurations for DL channels on serving cell
UE reports capability of S-DCI based MTRP

sub_clauses.title: Known conditions for downlink TCI state
conditions: SSB can be associated with the serving cell PCI (different from clause 8.15.2)

sub_clauses.title: MAC-CE based downlink TCI state switch delay
sub_clauses.both_known: UE able to receive UE-dedicated PDCCH/PDSCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + max{T_{Ok1}*(T_{first-SSB1} + AD1*T_{SSB1} + T_{SSB-proc}), T_{Ok2}*(T_{first-SSB2} + AD2*T_{SSB2} + T_{SSB-proc})}$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.one_unknown: UE able to receive UE-dedicated PDCCH/PDSCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + T_{L1-RSRP1} + max{T_{Ouk1}*(T_{first-SSB1} + AD1*T_{SSB1} + T_{SSB-proc}), T_{Ok2}*(T_{first-SSB2} + T_{SSB-proc})}$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.both_unknown: UE able to receive UE-dedicated PDCCH/PDSCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + max{T_{L1-RSRP1} + T_{Ouk1}*(T_{first-SSB1} + T_{SSB-proc}), T_{L1-RSRP2} + T_{Ok2}*(T_{first-SSB2} + T_{SSB-proc})}$ / NR slot length

variables.AD1: 1 if SSBs adjacent in FR2 and TSSB1 = TSSB2; 0 otherwise
variables.AD2: 1 if SSBs adjacent in FR2 and TSSB2 = TSSB1; 0 otherwise

clauses.title: Active downlink TCI state switching delay for unified TCI for multi-DCI mTRP

sub_clauses.title: Introduction
requirements: Requirements apply for UE configured with two different values of CORESETPoolIndex in ControlResourceSet with dl-OrJointTCI-StateList configurations
Requirements apply for UE not configured with 2 TAs, or UE configured with 2 TAs in FR1, or UE configured with 2 TAs in FR2 if RTD<CP
Requirements apply when UE not expected to receive simultaneously from two different QCL-D sources in FR2
Requirements applicable to each TRP independently

sub_clauses.title: Known conditions for downlink TCI state
MAC-CE based downlink TCI state switch delay
sub_clauses.known_tci_state: UE able to receive UE-dedicated PDCCH/PDSCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + T_{Ok}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc} + OL*T_{SSB})$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.unknown_tci_state: UE able to receive UE-dedicated PDCCH/PDSCH with target TCI state at first slot after slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + (T_{L1-RSRP} + T_{Ouk}*(T_{first-SSB} + T_{SSB-proc} + OL*T_{SSB}))$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.OL_definition: 1 if first SSB overlaps or is adjacent to first SSB from other TRP in FR2 and (SSB periodicity < other TRP SSB periodicity OR (SSB periodicity = other TRP SSB periodicity AND SSB associated to TRP with lowest coresetPoolIndex)); 0 otherwise

clauses.title: Active uplink TCI state switching delay for unified TCI for single-DCI mTRP

sub_clauses.title: Introduction
requirements: Requirements apply for UE configured with dl-OrJointTCI-StateList (if unifiedTCI-StateType is Joint) or TCI-UL-State configurations for UL channels/signals

sub_clauses.title: MAC-CE based uplink TCI state switch delay
sub_clauses.both_known: UE able to transmit UL signal with target TCI state(s) in slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + max{N_{M1}*(T_{first\_target-PL-RS1} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS1} + 2\ ms), N_{M2}*(T_{first\_target-PL-RS2} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS2} + 2\ ms)}$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.both_unknown: UE able to transmit UL signal with target TCI state(s) in slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + max{T_{L1-RSRP1} + T_{first\_target-PL-RS1} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS1} + 2\ ms, T_{L1-RSRP2} + T_{first\_target-PL-RS2} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS2} + 2\ ms}$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.one_unknown_one_known: UE able to transmit UL signal with target TCI state(s) in slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + max{T_{L1-RSRP1} + T_{first\_target-PL-RS1} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS1} + 2\ ms, N_{M2}*(T_{first\_target-PL-RS2} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS2} + 2\ ms)}$ / NR slot length

clauses.title: Active uplink TCI state switching delay for unified TCI for multi-DCI mTRP

sub_clauses.title: Introduction
requirements: Requirements apply for UE configured with dl-OrJointTCI-StateList (if unifiedTCI-StateType is Joint) or TCI-UL-State configurations
UE configured with two different values of CORESETPoolIndex in ControlResourceSet
Requirements apply for UE not configured with 2 TAs, or UE configured with 2 TAs in FR1, or UE configured with 2 TAs in FR2 if RTD<CP
Requirements apply when UE not expected to receive simultaneously with multi-RX in FR2
Requirements applicable to each TRP independently

sub_clauses.title: MAC-CE based uplink TCI state switch delay
sub_clauses.known_tci_state: UE able to transmit UL signal with target TCI state in slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + N_M*(T_{first\_target-PL-RS} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS} + 2\ ms)$ / NR slot length
sub_clauses.unknown_tci_state: UE able to transmit UL signal with target TCI state in slot $n + T_{HARQ} + 3N_{slot}^{subframe,\mu} + (T_{L1-RSRP} + T_{first\_target-PL-RS} + 4*T_{target\_PL-RS} + 2\ ms)$ / NR slot length
